document.title: TEST REPORT
document.revisionOrVersion: Report No. REP016215; TRF No. IEC60601_1_2J_EMC

sourceSummary.oneLine: Nemko Korea EMC test report REP016215 for H&abyz A1717MCW Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector against IEC/EN 60601-1-2.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports electromagnetic compatibility, emissions, immunity, basic safety, and essential performance evidence for the tested medical electrical equipment sample.
keyPoints: The tested sample is model A1717MCW, a Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector manufactured by H&abyz Co., Ltd.
Tests were performed from September 13, 2023 to September 27, 2023, with the report dated February 20, 2024.

Emission and immunity verdict summaries show pass results for applicable tests including conducted emission, radiated RF emission, harmonics, flicker, ESD, RF immunity, transients, surges, conducted RF, magnetic fields, voltage dips and interruptions, RF wireless proximity fields, and proximity magnetic fields.
The intended environment is a professional healthcare facility environment.

concepts.name: IEC 60601-1-2 EMC compliance
concepts.evidence: The product fulfils the requirements of IEC 60601-1-2:2014 and EN 60601-1-2:2015 IEC 60601-1-2:2014/AMD1:2020 and EN 60601-1-2:2015/A1:2021

concepts.name: Electromagnetic emissions testing
concepts.evidence: Tests performed: Conducted emission (7.3); Radiated RF emission (7.3); Harmonic distortion (7.2.1); Voltage fluctuations and flicker (7.2.2)

concepts.name: Electromagnetic immunity testing
concepts.evidence: Tests performed: Electrostatic discharges (8.9); Radiated RF EM fields (8.9); Proximity fields from RF wireless communications equipment (8.10); Electrical fast transients / burst (8.9); Surges (8.9)

concepts.name: Basic safety and essential performance during EMC testing
concepts.evidence: The essential performance for Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector during EMC test was defined as follows. - Operation normally when operation is required - DC power is consistently supplied

concepts.name: Professional healthcare facility environment
concepts.evidence: tended ENVIRONMENT Professional healthcare facility environment

concepts.name: KOLAS accredited test report
concepts.evidence: Accredited by KOLAS, Republic of KOREA

evidence.claim: The document is a test report issued under Report No. REP016215.
The tested product is a Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector, model A1717MCW.

evidence.pageTarget: A1717MCW Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector

evidence.claim: The client and manufacturer are H&abyz Co., Ltd.
evidence.evidenceText: Client Name : H&abyz Co., Ltd.; Manufacturer : H&abyz Co., Ltd.

evidence.claim: The tests were conducted from September 13, 2023 to September 27, 2023.
evidence.evidenceText: Date of Test : September 13, 2023 to September 27, 2023

evidence.evidenceText: CB Testing Laboratory: Nemko Korea Co., Ltd. Testing location/ address : 155, Osan-ro, Mohyeon-eup, Cheoin-gu, Yongin-si, Gyeonggi-do 16885, Republic of Korea

evidence.claim: The certificate is described as accredited test results by Korea Laboratory Accreditation Scheme, signed the ILAC-MRA.
evidence.evidenceText: The above test certificate is the accredited test results by Korea Laboratory Accreditation Scheme, which signed the ILAC-MRA.
The product fulfils the requirements of IEC 60601-1-2:2014 and EN 60601-1-2:2015 IEC 60601-1-2:2014/AMD1:2020 and EN 60601-1-2:2015/A1:2021

evidence.claim: The device is intended for general radiographic diagnosis of human anatomy for adults and children and is not for mammography or direct cardiac application.
evidence.evidenceText: A1717MCW Digital Flat Panel X-Ray Detector are indicated for digital imaging solution designed for providing general radiographic diagnosis of human anatomy targeting both adult and children... Not to be used for mammography and direct cardiac application.

evidence.claim: The intended environment is a professional healthcare facility environment.
evidence.evidenceText: tended ENVIRONMENT Professional healthcare facility environment

evidence.claim: The test item is classified as portable.
evidence.evidenceText: Classification of installation and use : Portable

evidence.claim: The rated power includes a rechargeable Li-ion battery, main adaptor, and power supply box ratings.
evidence.evidenceText: Rechargeable Li-ion Battery : D.C. 11.55 V, 3200 mAh, 36.96 Wh; Main Adaptor : INPUT A.C. (100 - 240) V... OUTPUT D.C 15 V, 6 A; Power supply box : INPUT A.C. (100 - 240) V... OUTPUT D.C. 16 V, 3 A

evidence.claim: The software version is V2.0 and hardware version is R0.
evidence.evidenceText: Software version : V2.0 Hardware version : R0

evidence.claim: The device dimensions are 460 x 384 x 15 mm.
evidence.evidenceText: Dimensions (W x H x D) : 460 x 384 x 15 mm (W x L x H)

evidence.claim: Applicable emission tests in the verdict summary passed for CISPR 11 terminal disturbance voltages and radiation disturbance.
evidence.evidenceText: Terminal disturbance voltages CISPR 11:2015 +A1:2016 + A2:2019 P; Radiation disturbance CISPR 11:2015 +A1:2016 + A2:2019 P

evidence.claim: AC mains harmonics and voltage fluctuations/flicker passed.
evidence.evidenceText: AC-Mains Harmonics IEC 61000-3-2:2018/AMD1:2020 P; AC-Mains Voltage fluctuations and flicker IEC 61000-3-3:2013/AMD1:2017 P

evidence.claim: Applicable immunity tests in the verdict summary passed for ESD, radiated RF EM fields, EFT/burst, surges, conducted RF, power frequency magnetic fields, voltage dips, voltage interruptions, RF wireless proximity fields, and proximity magnetic fields.
evidence.evidenceText: ELECTROSTATIC DISCHARGE IEC 61000-4-2:2008 P; Radiated RF EM fields IEC 61000-4-3:2020 P; Electrical fast transients / bursts IEC 61000-4-4:2012 P; Surges IEC 61000-4-5:2014+A1:2017 P

evidence.claim: The essential performance criteria include normal operation, consistent DC power supply, normal operation of the manufacturer's program, and image acquisition as intended.
evidence.evidenceText: The essential performance for Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector during EMC test was defined as follows. - Operation normally when operation is required - DC power is consistently supplied... - Acquisition image is obtained as intended.

reviewFlags.reason: Source metadata authoritySignal is MFDS/domestic, but the source text identifies Nemko Korea and KOLAS accreditation rather than MFDS review or approval.

Pages 82 through 163 contain page headers without extracted substantive content in the provided text, so attachment or measurement detail extraction may be incomplete.
